default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review a repeatable content audit framework for client analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sydney built a repeatable content audit framework in Google Sheets to automate analysis, reducing a multi-day task to a few hours.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [The framework uses `IF-THEN` logic to categorize pages for action (e.g., `Refresh/Update`, `Redirect`), providing clear, data-backed recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [A custom Apps Script automates pulling article publish dates, a critical step that bypasses manual review and enables analysis of content age.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Katya will adapt the framework for the Sentinel-1 client, enabling Bailey to lead the conversation without needing to perform the audit herself.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit Framework

  - [**Goal:** Create a repeatable, automated audit process to replace manual work.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Data Inputs:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
      - [**GSC (6-month & prior 6-month periods):** Clicks, impressions, CTR, position.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
      - [**GA4 (6-month & prior 6-month periods):** Engaged sessions, organic sessions, avg. engagement time, bounce rate.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
      - [**GA4:** Page title data (for customer context).](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**Automation:** `VLOOKUP` and `SUMIFS` formulas combine all raw data into a single analysis sheet.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

### Automated Action Recommendations

  - [The framework uses `IF-THEN` logic to assign a "Recommended Action" and "Reasoning" for each page.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [**Action Categories & Logic:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
      - [`Potentially New Content`: Previous 6-month data is zero.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
      - [`Refresh/Update Content`:](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
          - [High clicks → low engagement (mismatch between search intent and content).](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
          - [Falling impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
          - [Overall performance decline not severe enough for deletion.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
          - [Old content that is still performing.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [`Keep Performing Well`: Trending upwards (low priority to monitor).](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [`Monitor Performing Okay`: Stable performance (P3 priority).](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [`Old Article Update or Redirect`: Low/no performance. Requires manual client review to decide between refresh or redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [**Publish Date Automation:** A custom Apps Script pulls article publish dates, a key metric for identifying old content.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Process:** Use ChatGPT to generate the script. If it fails, provide ChatGPT with the raw data the script pulls to help it identify the date format.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [**Reasoning Formula Generation:** ChatGPT can generate the reasoning text formulas.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Critical Prompting:** Instruct ChatGPT to consider absolute values, not just percentage changes. A 100% increase from 0 to 1 click is not a positive signal.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sydney:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [Share the audit framework template with Katya.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [Share the test Apps Script for pulling publish dates.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Adapt the framework for the Sentinel-1 client.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Sync with Bailey on presenting the audit findings.](https://fathom.video/share/Sm_Y2LCZS6oZqR3_Es96ThpsJgxvJsjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

action_items.description: Share audit template link in chat for Katya; she'll copy and adapt for Sentinel-1
Send test Apps Script for date extraction to Katya
Message Sydney re: Apps Script; then use script + ChatGPT to pull dates for Sentinel-1
